levelName: Level 66: While Loops - Sum of Digits
puzzleDescription: Use a while loop to extract each digit of a number and calculate their total sum.
objective: Input an integer and print the sum of its digits (e.g., 125 results in 8).
hints: Use 'num % 10' to get the last digit.
Add that digit to your 'sum' variable.
Use 'num /= 10' to remove the digit you just added.
